name: py2rust-ccbrd-ccbd-wire-protocol
title: ccbrd 完整实现 ccbd 线协议（Python 客户端互操作 parity）
description: Make ccbrd speak the full ccbd wire protocol so Python clients (ccb-agent-sidebar, ask skill, python ccb CLI) interoperate. Currently ccbrd serves Rust-CLI RPCs but Python ccb-agent-sidebar reports 'ccbd unavailable' = missing/mismatched RPC endpoints. This is the core remaining py->rust milestone for real multi-agent usage.
creator: luck
